rawAssistant: Considering your party's current state and the road ahead, I'd recommend stocking up on some essentials. Our Cold Salve might come in handy for any potential burns or scrapes, and a few Antidotes wouldn't hurt either – you never know when poison might strike. If you're feeling bold, a Shock Tonic could give your party a much-needed boost in case of an electrical mishap. What do you say?
